scripts.dev: bun run --cwd apps/server dev & bun run --cwd apps/web dev
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/validators build && bun run --cwd apps/server build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/validators typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck
